{{Quote|What I wouldn't give for the green hills of Vasch!|[[Sam Heggs]]|<ref name="Heggs' Tale" />}}
'''Vasch''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located within the [[Vasch system/Legends|Vasch system]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. An [[Agriworld/Legends|agriworld]]{{Fact}} of lush, green, rolling hills, it was the source of [[Vaschean rye/Legends|Vaschean rye]], and was possibly the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of [[Sam Heggs]].

==Description==
{{Quote|Ahhhh…like moonlight on a sweet Vaschean mare…|Sam Heggs, on Vaschean rye|<ref name="Heggs' Tale" />}}
Vasch was a planetary body in the [[Vasch system/Legends|Vasch system]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]' [[Arkanis sector/Legends|Arkanis sector]], and was one of that [[Sector/Legends|sector's]] [[Regency Worlds/Legends|Regency Worlds]]. It was situated in grid square R-17, and was located along the [[Vaschean Way]] [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperspace route]], as well as at one end of the [[Najiba Loop]] route.<ref name="TEA" /> It had at least one [[Moon/Legends|moon]] casting moonlight on Vaschean nights.<ref name="Heggs' Tale" /> A lush world, Vasch had a temperate climate, and was known as the sector's garden spot<ref name="TEA" /> with a terrain of green hills.<ref name="Heggs' Tale" />

==History==
Vasch was settled at the same time as [[Arkanis/Legends|Arkanis]], another of the Regency Worlds.<ref name="TEA" /> During the [[Galactic War]], the government of Vasch sold a large quantity of cheap "rubbish" that was confiscated from criminals.<ref name="Mission">{{TORcite|type=crewskill|Scavenging|Junk Sale}}</ref> Its hills were dotted with estates owned by wealthy retirees, and had graceful [[City/Legends|cities]] visited by tourists from across the sector.<ref name="TEA" />

While in [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]] on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]], [[Sam Heggs]] lamented being on the [[Desert/Legends|desert]] world rather than on Vasch's green hills. He encountered [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Jeet Travis]] drinking Vaschean rye, and traded a taste for the story of how he obtained a rare [[grumph]] egg.<ref name="Heggs' Tale" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic: Shadow of Revan]]'' {{Mo}}
